channel.title: Tech
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Tech, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: China-linked hacker extradited to US
item.description: Xu Zewei allegedly hacked thousands of US organizations, stole COVID-19 data.

item.title: San Francisco tech firms' police protection costs
item.description: Records reveal payments after recent attacks.

item.title: DeepMind's David Silver raises 1.1B forhuman−free AI learning
Truecaller faces pressure as growth slows
item.description: Slow growth leads Truecaller to focus on subscriptions and new features.
